title: Copper Tools & More
description: Adds copper tools, which have the same properties as iron tools but same durability as stone tools and attract lightning. Also adds some other items such as a new curse and hat.
body:
Have you ever felt like copper didn't have enough uses? Or you just want some more tools in the game? Then this mod is for you!

# Overview

A datapack/mod that adds copper tools. A stone pickaxe will no longer drop iron when mining iron ore, instead, you must first craft a copper pickaxe. All copper tools have the same properties as iron tools except for durability, which is the same as stone tools. Copper tools are also highly conductive, and holding one will put you at risk of being struck by lightning, even in clear weather. The datapack also adds some other features such as a new curse, the curse of conductivity, which can make any enchantable item conductive, 3 new advancements, and a new helmet, the conductive cap, which attracts lightning and gives fire resistance, night vision and strength when struck by lightning.

# Installation

This datapack is made for Minecraft version 1.21, but might work for later versions, it can be installed as a datapack along with a required resource pack, or as a Fabric/Forge/Quilt mod.
